title: 新增 Harness 约束设置二级菜单
summary: 完成 US-006 的故事级收口：确认一级菜单提供 Harness 约束设置入口，并将执行检查、项目约束、设计描述、故事上下文、源码上下文索引与 Agent Map 统一收敛到该二级菜单；本次续跑补齐了菜单结构文档、刷新了 Agent Map 工件，并写入可审计的故事产物。

tests.command: 2026-04-05: npm test -- --grep "menu|Package exposes a single user-facing UI design command|user-visible Harness entry labels keep command ids stable" -> passed.

riskReasons: The story risk was inferred from the available completion evidence.
releaseNotes: Completed scope: 新增 Harness 约束设置二级菜单.
rollbackHints: Review and revert these paths together if rollback is needed: EADME.md.
Use the story-scoped commit as the primary rollback unit before considering any selective revert.
followUps: 如果后续继续扩展约束类入口，优先继续挂到 constraints 节点下，避免重新把一级菜单压平。
如需让 README 与帮助面板展示完全相同的菜单树摘要，可后续抽取共享的菜单说明片段，减少双处维护。
